title: EQ - Custom EQ - White circle when changing value on sliders
scenario: Custom EQ slider dot shows a white circle that follows movement while dragging and disappears on release for all 7 sliders
steps: Press and hold the dot on the slider.
While holding, slide the dot left or right.
expected: A white circle appears around the dot while holding it, follows the dot's movement when sliding left/right, and disappears upon release. This behavior applies to all 7 sliders.
